legal.reviewNote: This text is a sample template and should be reviewed by your legal counsel before publication.

kvkk.title: Privacy Notice (KVKK)
body: As Quant&Shine Capital, we process your personal data as a data controller under Turkey's Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK"). This notice informs you about the purposes for which your personal data is processed and your rights.
Your personal data is processed for purposes such as providing portfolio management services, fulfilling legal obligations, managing customer relations, and meeting statutory retention requirements.

Your data is retained for the periods required by applicable legislation, protected by administrative and technical measures, and shared only with authorized persons and institutions to the extent permitted by law.

Under Article 11 of the KVKK, you have the right to access your data, request its correction or deletion, object to its processing, and learn the third parties to whom it has been transferred. You may submit your requests through our contact channels.

disclaimer.title: Legal Disclaimer
body: The information on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute a buy/sell recommendation, investment advisory, or a recommendation of any financial product.

Investment advisory services are provided under a contract signed between brokerage firms, portfolio management companies, and the client, in accordance with each person's risk and return preferences. Decisions made based on the views herein may not produce the expected results.

Past performance of investment funds and capital market instruments is not indicative of future performance. The value of invested instruments may rise or fall; all or part of the principal may be lost.
Quant&Shine Capital cannot be held liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from the use of the information on this site.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
body: Our website uses cookies to improve user experience, analyze site traffic, and remember your preferences.
Essential cookies are required for the core functions of the site. Analytics and preference cookies are optional and can be managed through your browser settings.
You can block or delete cookies by changing your browser settings; however, some parts of the site may not function properly in that case.
For detailed information about your cookie preferences and the processing of your personal data, please review our Privacy Notice (KVKK).

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to everything you may wonder about QuantShine Capital.
faq.ctaText: Our expert team is ready to help with anything you couldn't find an answer to.

items.q: Do I send my money to Quant&Shine Capital's account?
items.a: No. Funds are sent to accounts opened in the client's name at the custodian banks Quant&Shine Capital works with (Türkiye İş Bankası or Akbank), and the financial assets are held in the client's name by the custodian bank.

items.q: Can Quant&Shine Capital transfer my money or investments to third parties?
items.a: No. Client assets are held in custody accounts opened in the clients' own names, separately from Quant&Shine Capital's assets.

items.q: Can Quant&Shine Capital invest freely through the account opened in the client's name?
items.a: No. Quant&Shine Capital can only transact in line with the investment strategies specified in the fund's charter.
Mutual funds are financial instruments where the money of multiple investors is pooled together and managed by a professional fund manager.

items.q: Which assets can mutual funds invest in?
items.a: Mutual funds can invest in various financial assets such as equities, bonds, bills, gold, and foreign currency. The eligible assets are specified in the fund's charter.

items.q: What are the advantages of mutual funds?
items.a: They offer many advantages such as professional management, risk diversification, low costs, liquidity, and transparency.
The taxation of mutual funds may vary depending on the fund type and current tax laws. We recommend consulting a financial advisor for up-to-date information.

suitability.title: Suitability Test
suitability.subtitle: Discover your investor risk profile with a few questions and see the asset allocation that suits you.
suitability.ctaText: This profile is for guidance only. Talk to our expert team for a tailored portfolio.
suitability.disclaimer: This test is for informational purposes and does not constitute investment advice. The official suitability assessment is conducted during the contract process.

questions.q: What is your primary goal for investing?
options: To grow my capital over the long term

questions.q: What is your planned investment horizon?
What would you do if your portfolio dropped 20% in a year?
options: See an opportunity and buy more

questions.q: How would you describe your investment experience?
How much of your income can you allocate to investing?
Which is your most important priority?

conservative.name: Conservative
conservative.desc: Your priority is to protect your capital. You prefer low volatility and value safety over returns. Your portfolio consists mainly of fixed income and cash instruments.

balanced.name: Balanced
balanced.desc: You seek a balance between risk and return. You accept moderate volatility and aim for steady growth. A diversified portfolio suits you well.

growth.name: Growth
growth.desc: You prioritize long-term capital growth. You have a high tolerance for volatility and are comfortable with an equity-weighted portfolio.

aggressive.name: Aggressive
aggressive.desc: You aim for maximum return and accept high risk. Short-term volatility doesn't bother you; your portfolio is largely equities and alternative assets.

simulator.title: Return Simulator
simulator.subtitle: See how your investment could grow over time. Adjust the amount, horizon, and expected return.
simulator.disclaimer: This calculation is an illustrative estimate only; past performance does not guarantee future returns. Not investment advice.

compare.empty: Add at least one fund to start comparing.

portfolio.ctaTitle: Let's build your tailored portfolio strategy
portfolio.ctaText: Together we'll design an investment model suited to your risk profile and goals.

individual.title: INDIVIDUAL INVESTORS
individual.subtitle: Disciplined portfolio management tailored for qualified individual investors.
individual.lead: Our Individual Portfolio Management service is offered to qualified investors with a certain portfolio size under a signed framework agreement. Your risk profile, financial goals, and return expectations are analyzed in detail.
individual.body1: We make investment decisions based on macroeconomic analysis, market data, algorithmic models, and risk management parameters. We offer access to a broad asset universe including equities, fixed income, funds, derivatives, gold, and commodities.
individual.body2: Portfolios are diversified to suit your risk tolerance; profit-taking, stop-loss, and risk-reduction processes are run systematically. The goal is to preserve capital and generate long-term value through volatile market conditions.
individual.b1x: Tailored asset allocation after suitability testing and portfolio assessment.
individual.b2x: Balanced diversification across equities, bonds, funds, derivatives, gold, and commodities.
individual.b3x: Active risk balancing with options and derivative strategies.
individual.b4x: Our priority is to protect your capital, then deliver sustainable returns.

corporate.title: CORPORATE INVESTORS
corporate.subtitle: Boutique portfolio management tailored to your institution's financial structure.
corporate.lead: Our Corporate Portfolio Management service targets family businesses, private and public companies, pension funds, insurance firms, and institutions with net cash positions. We structure investment models around each institution's specific needs.
corporate.body1: When building portfolio strategies, cash flow projections, balance sheet structure, liability maturity, and risk/return expectations are analyzed in detail. Dynamic asset allocation models are actively updated according to market conditions.
corporate.body2: Our investment universe spans local and global equities, public and private debt instruments, Eurobonds, funds, commodities, derivatives, and alternative strategies. During downturns, our hedging and balancing strategies protect portfolios effectively.
corporate.b1x: An investment model structured to liquidity needs and risk appetite.
corporate.b2x: Effective communication and fast decision-making flexibility.
corporate.b3x: A portfolio dynamically updated to market conditions.
corporate.b4x: Capital protection through hedging and balancing strategies.

about.title: ABOUT US
about.subtitle: Independent portfolio management built on data, discipline, and risk control.
about.whoP1: Quant&Shine Capital is an independent portfolio management firm built on the foundations of data, discipline, and risk control. Our priority is to protect our investors' capital first, then generate controlled and sustainable returns.
about.whoP2: All our investment decisions are made in line with measurable risk parameters, macroeconomic analysis, and systematic strategies. Our risk-balancing approach using algorithmic models and derivatives lets us position portfolios dynamically against changing market conditions.
about.whoP3: By evaluating local and global financial dynamics together, we provide professional, transparent, and disciplined portfolio management to both corporate and individual investors. For us, success means generating long-term value under controlled risk rather than short-term gains.
about.missionText: To protect our investors' capital first and generate long-term, sustainable value within a controlled risk framework.
about.visionText: To become the leading independent portfolio management firm in Turkey and the region through our data-driven, technology-powered approach.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles behind every decision we make.
about.value1Text: We build long-term, trust-based relationships with our investors.
about.value2Text: We adopt an open, measurable, and accountable approach in every process.
about.value3Text: We stay ahead with algorithmic models and technology-powered analysis.
about.value4Text: We apply disciplined, systematic risk control with capital protection as the priority.
about.ctaText: Meet our expert team to build your tailored portfolio strategy.
